heading.title: Settings Control
heading.subtitle: You can control the application settings from here.

warning_note.title: Important Note
warning_note.description: Changing the settings may affect the user experience. Please make sure you understand the changes you are making.

application_period.title: Application Period
application_period.description: Settings related to the application period for new students, including opening and closing the application period.

housing.title: University Housing
housing.description: Settings related to university housing services.

resturant.title: Restaurant
resturant.description: Settings related to restaurant services and meal schedule.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Settings related to the attendance and absence system.
